subcodes.first_line: O Thou Whose remembrance is healing to the hearts of the righteous, Whose praise is a sovereign remedy for the free, and Whose glorification is medicine for every ill [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من ذکرک شفاء قلوب الابرار و نعتک دریاق فاروق الاحرار و ثنائک دواء برء علل
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for healing, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
